title: dalbergia sandakanensis
intro: Dalbergia sandakanensis, also known as Borneo rosewood, is a type of tree native to the island of Borneo in Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Dalbergia sandakanensis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antimalarial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever, cough, and other ailments.
